title: Caramelized American Bramley Apples Stir-fry
description: A fermented and juicy whole30-friendly dish featuring bramley apples caramelized to perfection in a stir-fry.
instructions: Wash and peel the Bramley Apples. Slice them into thin wedges.
Heat ghee or coconut oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add apple slices to the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes per side, turning frequently to ensure even caramelization.
Stir in coconut sugar while cooking to caramelize the apples. Reduce heat as needed to maintain a low flame. Continue cooking until all apples are well-caramelized and tender.
Add lime juice towards the end of the cooking process to brighten up the dish without overpowering the flavors.
